---
pagetitle: "About — Simon Yan"
toc: false
page-layout: custom
---

<!-- ========== ABOUT HERO ========== -->
::: {.about-hero}
::: {.about-grid}

::: {.profile-photo-placeholder}
<i class="bi bi-person"></i>
:::

::: {.about-intro}

# Simon Yan

[Data Scientist · Quantitative Analyst · AI/ML Engineer]{.subtitle}

::: {.bio}
I'm a **data scientist** and **quantitative analyst** finishing my Master's in **Information Science (Data Science)** at **Cornell University**. My work sits at the intersection of three tracks: **quantitative finance**, **AI/ML & forward-deployed engineering**, and **data analytics & engineering** — turning messy market and real-world data into signals, models, and decisions.

Across two quantitative-finance internships at **Central China Securities** (HKEX: 1375), I optimized multi-factor alpha signals, built backtesting frameworks, and engineered ETL pipelines processing 100K+ daily records. More recently I **led a 7-person team** on a private-equity forecasting study, and I build hands-on AI systems — from RAG applications to a personal algorithmic trading system prototyped with Claude Code.

Beyond the terminal, I'm into **film photography**, **playing bass guitar**, and the intersection of data science and **market microstructure**. I'm currently seeking 2026 opportunities where rigorous analysis meets real business impact.
:::

::: {.hero-cta style="margin-top:2rem;"}
[<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i> View Resume](resume.qmd){.btn-primary-custom}
[<i class="bi bi-grid-1x2"></i> See Projects](projects.qmd){.btn-outline-custom}
:::

:::
:::
:::

<!-- ========== EXPERIENCE ========== -->
::: {.section .bg-white}
::: {.section-narrow}

[Career]{.section-label}

## Professional Experience {.section-heading}

::: {.timeline}

::: {.timeline-item .reveal}
[Sept 2025 — Dec 2025]{.period}

### Quantitative Analyst Lead {.mb-0}
[The Riverside Company · Capstone Engagement]{.org}

::: {.desc}
- Led a **team of 7** in a multi-question analysis of Riverside's portfolio, combining statistical testing (chi-square, logistic regression) and time-series regression on IRR / GCoC to evaluate projection accuracy and flag early outperformance / underperformance signals.
- Quantified the relationship between projection accuracy (EBITDA/Sales) and exit success — finding **no statistically significant relationship**, a counterintuitive result that reframed the client's underwriting assumptions.
- Realigned the analytical approach mid-project on client feedback, and delivered a final MVP dashboard plus technical documentation for reproducible internal handoff.

:::
:::

::: {.timeline-item .reveal}
[June 2024 — Aug 2024]{.period}

### Quantitative Investment Researcher {.mb-0}
[Central China Securities (HKEX: 1375) · Shanghai, China · Intern]{.org}

::: {.desc}
- Optimized **10+ multi-factor alpha signals** (e.g., Momentum, Volatility) by incorporating market-regime classification to enhance signal stability and reduce drawdown during volatile periods.
- Developed a Python backtesting system enabling automated simulation of **20+ equity strategies** to support hypothesis validation and parameter tuning.
- Architected an automated ETL pipeline in Pandas to process **100K+ daily entries** with rigorous cleaning logic, and synthesized performance metrics into tactical briefs supporting Investment Committee asset-allocation decisions.

:::
:::

::: {.timeline-item .reveal}
[June 2023 — Aug 2023]{.period}

### Financial Product Researcher {.mb-0}
[Central China Securities (HKEX: 1375) · Intern]{.org}

::: {.desc}
- Spearheaded sector research across the Semiconductor and Autonomous Driving industries, producing **3 deep-dive investment memos** that informed the product-development roadmap.
- Assessed risk-adjusted return profiles of 4 candidate funds against benchmarks, informing selection of **2 funds** for the firm's Fund-of-Funds allocation.
- Conducted due diligence on **12+ potential investments**, classifying operational and liquidity risks (Beta, Alpha, Standard Deviation) to refine the firm's evaluation scope.

:::
:::

:::

:::
:::

<!-- ========== EDUCATION ========== -->
::: {.section .bg-alt}
::: {.section-narrow}

[Education]{.section-label}

## Academic Background {.section-heading}

::: {.timeline}

::: {.timeline-item .reveal}
[Expected May 2026]{.period}

### M.P.S. Information Science {.mb-0}
[Cornell University · Ithaca, NY · Data Science Concentration]{.org}

::: {.desc}
Cumulative GPA: 3.45/4.0. Relevant coursework: Applied Machine Learning · Simulation Modeling & Analysis · Data Communication · Info Computing.
:::
:::

::: {.timeline-item .reveal}
[Graduated June 2025]{.period}

### B.A. Geography: Data Science {.mb-0}
[University of Washington · Seattle, WA]{.org}

::: {.desc}
Cumulative GPA: 3.55/4.0 · Major GPA: **3.89/4.0** · Annual Dean's List (2023–2024, 2024–2025). Relevant coursework: Data Science · Machine Learning · GIS Database Programming · Elements of Statistical Methods.
:::
:::

:::

:::
:::

<!-- ========== AWARDS ========== -->
::: {.section .bg-white}
::: {.section-narrow}

[Recognition]{.section-label}

## Awards & Honors {.section-heading}

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.project-card .reveal}
::: {.card-icon .orange}
<i class="bi bi-trophy"></i>
:::

### 2nd Place — UC Davis Big Bang!

Business Competition · 2025

Awarded 2nd Place for **RoomExchange**, a full-stack university housing-swap platform — recognized among peer startups for technical feasibility and market viability.
:::

::: {.project-card .reveal .d1}
::: {.card-icon .blue}
<i class="bi bi-award"></i>
:::

### Annual Dean's List

University of Washington · 2023–2025

Named to the Dean's List in consecutive years while maintaining a **3.89/4.0 major GPA** in Geography: Data Science.
:::

:::

:::
:::

<!-- ========== BEYOND WORK ========== -->
::: {.section .bg-alt .text-center}
::: {.section-narrow}

## Beyond Work {.section-heading}

Great analysis is driven by curiosity. Away from the terminal, I shoot **film photography**, play **bass guitar**, and follow the mechanics of **market microstructure** — the same attention to pattern and detail I bring to data.

::: {.hero-cta}
[<i class="bi bi-download"></i> Download Resume](resume.qmd){.btn-primary-custom}
[<i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Contact Me](contact.qmd){.btn-outline-custom}
:::

:::
:::
